examples: He was wearing a stripy shirt and baggy blue trousers.
But Ben put red shorts, a red stripy top and red slippers.
Butt Ben put red shorts, a red stripy top and red slippers.
Researchers from New Zealand also analysed how the stripy patterns were formed along the veins of the common snapdragon.
Grierson must hope that like Paradis, his new venture can shed French music's stripy top, beret and whiff of stale garlic.
